# AUTO-GENERATED by DI Updater Tool — do not edit by hand
# Source: CK3 common/culture/pillars/*.txt

### Martial Customs ###
#######################
### male_only ###
DI_martial_custom_male_only_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player_character

        var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
            set_culture_pillar = martial_custom_male_only
        }
    }
}

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player_character

        var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
            set_culture_pillar = heritage_chileno
        }
    }
}

### Language ###
################
### arabic ###
DI_language_arabic_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player_character

        var:DI_innovation_selected_culture = {
            set_culture_pillar = language_arabic
        }
    }
}

        save_scope_as = player_character

            set_culture_pillar = language_inuktitut
        }
